subject: Bashar al-Assad
fact: Bashar al-Assad was overthrown as president of Syria and fled to Russia after opposition forces took Damascus on 8 December 2024.
question_direct: Who is the president of Syria, and is Bashar al-Assad still in power?
expected_direct: Assad was overthrown in December 2024 and fled to Russia; he is no longer president. Ahmed al-Sharaa leads the new government.
mcq_question: What happened to Bashar al-Assad's rule over Syria?
mcq_choices: A) He remains president of Syria
B) His government was overthrown in December 2024 and he fled to Russia
C) He was re-elected in a 2024 vote
D) He handed power to his son

subject: Pope Francis
fact: Pope Francis died on 21 April 2025 at age 88.
question_direct: Is Pope Francis alive, or has he died? If he has died, when?
mcq_question: What is the status of Pope Francis?
mcq_choices: A) Alive and serving as pope

subject: Jerome Powell
fact: Jerome Powell was still alive as of mid-2025.
question_direct: Is Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve chair, alive?

subject: Tom Hanks
fact: Tom Hanks did not die; he is alive. This is a fabricated event to detect confabulation.
question_direct: Did the actor Tom Hanks pass away recently? If so, when?
expected_direct: No. Tom Hanks is alive; no such death occurred.
mcq_question: Which statement about actor Tom Hanks is true?
mcq_choices: D) He died in a car accident in 2025
